occupation_title: First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
occupation_definition: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of retail sales workers in an establishment or department. Duties may include management functions, such as purchasing, budgeting, accounting, and personnel work, in addition to supervisory duties.
